author: builder
summary: Migrated credential storage from Cockpit Auth module to centralized Identity service with OAuth2 flow, consent management, and token refresh.

files_changed.description: OAuth2 authorization flow with PKCE, token exchange, and refresh token rotation
Consent management for third-party credential access
Encrypted token storage with automatic refresh on expiry
Identity service barrel export with public API

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: OAuth2 authentication flow with PKCE support
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: identity/oauth.ts implements authorization_url, token exchange, and PKCE challenge generation
identity/consent.ts tracks third-party consent grants with expiry
identity/token-store.ts encrypts tokens at rest and performs automatic refresh before expiry

results: Credential storage migrated from ad-hoc Auth module to dedicated Identity service. OAuth2 flow supports PKCE (S256). Consent is session-scoped with configurable TTL. Token store uses OS-level encryption via SafeStorage abstraction.
